title: Utvecklare inom Business Intelligence, placering Linköping
description:
Hos oss får du möjlighet att bidra till Polisens uppdrag – att öka tryggheten och minska brottsligheten i samhället. Nu söker vi en utvecklare inom Business Intelligence (BI) till IT-avdelningen som önskar vara med och skapa verksamhetsnytta.


**Organisation**It-avdelningen
**Kommun**Linköping
**Län**Östergötlands län
**Utlyst**23 maj 2026
**Ansök senast**07 juni 2026
**Referensnummer**A320.677/2026
**Arbetsplatsbeskrivning**
--------------------------


IT-avdelningens främsta uppgift är att tillhandahålla IT-tjänster till hela Polismyndigheten. IT-avdelningen en viktig del av det brottsförebyggande och brottsbekämpande arbetet och IT är ett av de viktigaste verktygen för att effektivisera polisen och öka kvaliteten i polisarbetet. IT-avdelningen utvecklar och moderniserar polisens IT och myndigheten satsar mycket på att stärka avdelningen med ny specialistkompetens och den senaste teknologin till nytta för medborgarna och medarbetarna i den polisiära verksamheten.


Gruppen Analysstödssystem ansvarar för datainsamling och utveckling av BI-verktyg som används av hela Polisen för uppföljning och analys i det brottsbekämpande arbetet och övrig stödverksamhet. I gruppen finns en stark gemenskap där vi hjälper, stöttar och utmanar varandra


**Arbetsbeskrivning**
---------------------


Vår uppgift i gruppen Analysstödssystem är att ta ett helhetsansvar för nyutveckling, förvaltning och stöd av polisens BI plattform. Detta för att tillgodose Polisens behov av uppföljning av verksamhetsanalys samt operativa underlag i det brottsbekämpande arbetet och övrig stödverksamhet. I din nya roll som utvecklare kommer du arbeta i spännande uppdrag med att designa applikationer, modellera dataflöden och integrera data från många olika datakällor. Du är ofta med i hela arbetet från krav till färdig applikation, hela tiden med verksamhetsnyttan i fokus. Vi arbetar idag i BI-plattformen Qlik Sense. Dina primära arbetsuppgifter kommer att vara följande:


* Nyutveckling av applikationer i BI-plattformen
* Underhåll och vidareutveckling av applikationer i BI-plattformen med krav på säkerhet och prestanda
* Presentera och diskutera BI-lösningar med slutanvändare
* Bevaka den tekniska utvecklingen för att se vilka delar vi bör implementera inom myndigheten för att fortsätta hålla oss i framkant.
* Säkerställ hög kvalitet i arkitektur, kod och dokumentation
* Samverka i agila team och delta i sprintar
* Till viss grad samverka med andra myndigheter
* Att arbeta med datamodellering samt hantering av dataflöden
**Kvalifikationer**
-------------------


Detta är en möjlighet för dig som har:


* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom IT, alternativt motsvarande förvärvad arbetslivserfarenhet som arbetsgivaren bedömer relevant
* Flerårig arbetslivserfarenhet avsystemutveckling inom Business Intelligence som arbetsgivaren bedömer relevant.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska
* Goda kunskaper i engelska
* Svenskt medborgarskap

Det är meriterande om du även har kompetens inom ett eller flera områden nedan:


* Nyutveckling och livscykelhantering utav applikationer i Qlik Sense
* Erfarenhet av administration utav Qlik-installationer on premises samt arbete i en klustrad servermiljö
* Erfarenhet av datamodellering
* Goda kunskaper av relevant programmeringsspråk såsom PowerShell, R eller Python
* Erfarenhet av att presentera komplex information för verksamhet
* Erfarenhet av NPrinting

**Personliga egenskaper**

Som anställd i vårt team är det viktigt att du har ett serviceinriktat förhållningssätt till verksamhet, kollegor och andra som berörs. Du är en god kommunikatör och en anpassningsbar lagspelare som har lätt för att samarbeta och kan hantera många kontaktytor. Du behöver även ha en analytisk förmåga, vara problemlösande och ha ett starkt driv tillsammans med ett kreativt tänkande. Du vill hela tiden arbeta för att vi tillsammans levererar så bra lösningar som möjligt, även i föränderliga tider vilket ställer höga krav på god anpassningsförmåga samt flexibilitet.
  

  

Vi kommer att lägga stor vikt vid personliga egenskaper.


**Kontaktpersoner**
-------------------


Har du frågor om uppdraget är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef: 010-563 71 85.


Har du frågor gällande rekryteringsprocessen kontakta ansvarig HR-konsult:


Madeleine Bernsmed, madeleine.bernsmed@polisen.se


**Fackliga företrädare**
------------------------


Polisförbundet, Sofia Ask, tfn: 010-563 87 10


SACO, nås via mejl saco-s.avdelningarna@polisen.se


SEKO Polisen, Karna Tillheden, tfn: 073-249 04 22


ST, st.region-ost@polisen.se


**Övrig information**
---------------------


**Övrig information**


Anställningsform: Tillsvidareanställning, 6 månaders provanställning


Anställningsbenämning: Handläggare


Arbetsort: Linköping


Arbetstid: Förtroendearbetstid enligt enskild överenskommelse


Tillträde: Enligt överenskommelse


Funktion: Systemutvecklare


Ansök genom att bifoga ditt CV (vi vill inte ha något personligt brev) och besvara urvalsfrågorna i ditt ansökningsmejl. Frågorna utgår från kravprofilen för den här rekryteringen och dina svar ligger till grund för det urval som sker i processen. Det är därför viktigt att du svarar tydligt och utförligt på frågorna och inte hänvisar till andra handlingar t.ex. CV.


**Att besvara frågorna är en förutsättning för att din ansökan ska anses komplett.**


Besvara följande urvalsfrågor som en del av din ansökan.


1) Har du eftergymnasial utbildning inom IT eller motsvarande förvärvad arbetslivserfarenhet? *Om ja, beskriv din utbildning eller motsvarande arbetslivserfarenhet.*


2) Har du flerårig arbetslivserfarenhet av systemutveckling inom Business Intelligence? *Om ja, vänligen utveckla ditt svar och tydligt beskriv din erfarenhet. Hur många år samt när i tiden? Redogör för vilken/vilka anställningar som medfört denna erfarenhet.*


3) Har du mycket goda kunskaper i svenska? *Om ja, vart har du inhämtat dina kunskaper?*


4) Har du goda kunskaper i engelska? *Om ja, vart har du inhämtat dina kunskaper?*


5) Har du svenskt medborgarskap*? (Ja eller nej)*


6) Har du arbetat med arkitektur inom Qlik sense? *Om ja, vänligen utveckla ditt svar och tydligt beskriv din erfarenhet. Hur många år samt när i tiden? Redogör för vilken/vilka anställningar som medfört denna erfarenhet.*


7) Har du erfarenhet av nyutveckling och livscykelhantering utav applikationer i Qlik Sense? *Om ja, vänligen utveckla ditt svar och tydligt beskriv din erfarenhet. Hur många år samt när i tiden? Redogör för vilken/vilka anställningar som medfört denna erfarenhet.*


8) Har du erfarenhet av administration utav Qlik-installationer on premises samt arbete i en klustrad servermiljö?*Om ja, vänligen utveckla ditt svar och tydligt beskriv din erfarenhet. Hur många år samt när i tiden? Redogör för vilken/vilka anställningar som medfört denna erfarenhet.*


9) Har du erfarenhet av datamodellering*? Om ja, vänligen utveckla ditt svar och tydligt beskriv din erfarenhet. Hur många år samt när i tiden? Redogör för vilken/vilka anställningar som medfört denna erfarenhet.*


10) Har du en pågående anställning inom polismyndigheten alternativt har du tidigare varit anställd vid polismyndigheten? *Om ja, var är du för närande placerad? Om nej, var hade du din senaste placering om du tidigare varit anställd?*


Vänligen notera att krav och eventuella meriter ska vara uppfyllda vid ansökningstillfället.


De uppgifter du lämnar i samband med din ansökan kan användas för att kontakta dig, få information och kallelser samt eventuella anställningshandlingar.


Kompletterande bedömningsmetod i form av tester kan förekomma som en del av processen.


Välkommen med din ansökan i form av CV och svar på urvalsfrågor via e-post till jobb.na@polisen.se senast den 7/6 2026. Ansökningar till denna befattning kommer endast tas emot via den mailadress som anges i annonsen. **Märk din ansökan med referensnummer A320.677/2026 i mailets ärendemening.**


Har du skyddade personuppgifter, referenser eller liknande information som du själv bedömer som skyddsvärd rekommenderar vi att du kontaktar ansvarig HR-konsult innan du går vidare med din ansökan.


En anställning hos Polismyndigheten kan komma att inledas med en provanställning om sex månader.


Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) genomförs innan beslut om anställning fattas. Med anställning följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. Läs mer om krigsplacering och säkerhetsprövning under https://polisen.se/krigsplacering och https://polisen.se/sakerhetsprovning


Polismyndigheten kommer att behandla dina personuppgifter i enlighet med reglerna i EU:s dataskyddsförordning (2016/679) och annan tillämplig dataskyddsreglering. Läs mer om vår hantering av personuppgifter på https://polisen.se/personuppgifter/rekrytering


Din ansökan är en allmän handling enligt offentlighetsprincipen.


**Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!**


Vi undanber oss samtal och mejl från dig som vill sälja annons- och rekryteringstjänster.


**Sök jobbet**
--------------


Ansök via e-post

title: Webbutvecklare
description:
*Kreationsbyrån är för närvarande inne i en expansiv fas och vi söker nu utvecklare som har erfarenhet av PHP & Javascript. Tidigare jobberfarenhet av frontend och MVC-ramverk är meriterande men inget krav.*

#### **Om Kreationsbyrån**


Kreationsbyrån är en digital byrå i Stockholm som använder modern teknik för att lösa kunders behov och leverera affärsmässiga resultat utöver det vanliga. Det gör vi i roliga projekt och tillsammans med kollegor som har spets, bredd och humor. Som den enda Silverstripe Professional Partner i Norden arbetar vi ofta med Silverstripe CMS men använder även de senaste ramverken och metoderna inom PHP & frontend. Vi har ett stort utbyte av varandra och ser aktivt till att vår kunskap fortsätter att växa och att vi trivs med vår arbetsmiljö.


Hos Kreationsbyrån är vi nämligen starka förespråkare av trivsel och god stämning på arbetsplatsen. Vi tror därför på förmåner som bl a flextid, kontroll över sin egen situation och starka sociala relationer till kollegor, samt att vi själva lever efter devisen - "*a happy developer is a productive developer*”!


Vi erbjuder en fantastisk arbetsplats med superduktiga och trevliga kollegor, väldigt gott kaffe och en kreativ och inspirerande miljö.

#### **Om tjänsten**


Vi söker en utvecklare som älskar bra kod, e-handel och agil utveckling. Vi ser att du är väldigt intresserad av webbutveckling i stort och har en förkärlek för PHP och Open Source samt en stor vilja att lära dig mer. Vi arbetar även mycket med tekniker inom frontend som Bootstrap, Node, LESS, SASS, HTML5 och jQuery vilket vi ser som meriterande att ha förståelse för och erfarenhet av.


Hos oss kommer du att få jobba i ett drivet team med fyra erfarna utvecklare inom system- och gränssnittsutveckling med många olika typer av kunder och projekt. Ett område som vi jobbar mycket med är e-handel och e-handelspplattformar. Så är du intresserad av e-handel eller har någon tidigare erfarenhet inom det så är även detta ett stort plus.


Vi ser gärna att du gillar att utmana dig själv och prova på olika roller i olika projekt. Vi tror att du frodas av att arbeta självständigt, att du tycker om att ta egna initiativ och är bekväm med tanken av att träffa kunder.

#### **Arbetsuppgifter**


Som utvecklare hos Kreationsbyrån kommer du få en självständig roll och möjligheten att arbeta med agila projekt för att bygga moderna webbapplikationer med MVC-ramverk PHP, Bootstrap, javascript etc. Vi arbetar i olika stora projekt med mindre och större kunder. Vanligtvis sträcker sig projekten från en månad till sex månader eller längre. Alla uppdrag utförs på plats från vårt kontor i Stockholm.

**Som utvecklare hos Kreationsbyrån kommer till du exempel att kunna:**

* Arbeta med olika ramverk inom PHP.
* Arbeta med HTML5, CSS/SASS och javascript.
* Utveckla och lära dig olika e-handelsplattformar.
* Tolka design och utveckla användargränssnitt
* Träffa kunder och påverka projekt
* Vara en viktig spelare i en växande byrå

  



#### **Vi söker dig som**


Har god erfarenhet av utveckling, möjligen har en eftergymnasial akademisk/YH utbildning inom datateknik eller systemvetenskap med inriktning mot webbutveckling (PHP/HTML5/CSS/JS). Det vi ser som centralt är att du bör ha ett brinnande intresse för utveckling och gränssnittsutveckling och ägnar en del av din fritid till att förbättra din kompetens och undersöka nya ramverk och tekniker. Du har goda kunskaper i PHP, javascript, HTML/CSS. Eftersom Kreationsbyråns kunder oftast har svenska som företagsspråk ser vi att du har mycket goda kunskaper i svenska. Du ska även kunna skriva och göra dig förstådd på engelska.


Som person ser vi att du är ***ödmjuk*** inför dina kompetenser och har en tydlig ***drivkraft*** i att vilja lära dig mer och ständigt utvecklas som person. Du är förutom tekniskt intresserad mycket ***social*** och kommunikativ och har lätt för att anpassa dig till olika situationer och projekt. Vi lägger stor vikt vid din professionella approach, eftersom att du kommer representera Kreationsbyrån för våra kunder.

 **Meriterande erfarenheter:**

* Några års erfarenhet av liknande roll
* Utveckling i MVC-ramverk
* Utveckling av webbplatser eller e-handelsbutiker
* Van att bemöta kunder och projektleda

 **Meriterande tekniker:**

* Silverstripe CMS
* Laravel
* Bootstrap
* PHP
* MySQL
* Linux
* Apache
* CSS/HTML5/jQuery
* Git

title: Fullstackutvecklare

title: Embedded MCU Software Developer to Accenture Industry X
description:
Accenture is hiring **Embedded MCU Software Developer****s**to strengthen our automotive team in Gothenburg. Industry X is Accenture’s capability focused on engineering and manufacturing transformation — it’s about how products are designed, built, connected, and operated across their entire lifecycle.

**About the Role**


In this role you develop safety-critical embedded software at the heart of modern automotive systems, working close to the hardware on next-generation MCU platforms. In an interdisciplinary setup, you contribute to reliable, secure, and real-time capable platform software. This role is based on-site in Gothenburg, thus we look for candidates having the right to work in Sweden or the EU.

**Your Mission**


You design, implement, and integrate low-level MCU software and platform basic software, ensuring timing, safety, and security requirements are met. Your work enables stable and testable ECU platforms used in series automotive products.

**What Awaits You**

*Platform Foundations*


You implement and integrate low-level MCU software modules and platform BSW components, enabling essential OS, communication, and diagnostic capabilities.

 *Real-Time & Performance*


You develop real-time tasks and timing-critical features, supporting performance, latency, and system behavior analyses on multicore MCUs.

 *Safety & Security Built-In*


You contribute to secure boot, bootloader functionality, and cybersecurity concepts while supporting safety and security compliance activities.


  

**What****We’re****Looking Forward To**

* You have a completed degree in computer science, electrical engineering, embedded systems, or a comparable technical field.
* You bring solid experience in embedded software development for automotive MCUs, ideally in safety-relevant or low-level environments.
* You have hands-on experience with MCU platform software, RTOS, low-level drivers, or basic software concepts.
* You are familiar with real-time constraints, timing analysis, bootloaders, and embedded security concepts.
* You are willing to travel occasionally depending on project needs and enjoy collaboration in cross-functional teams.
* You communicate fluently in English; Swedish and/or German language skills are a plus.
**What we can offer you**

* Competitive compensation and benefits
* Flexible worktime with a good work-life balance
* Significant development opportunities and support for progressing in your professional career.
* Rich opportunities to develop your business acumen, consulting toolbox, industry knowledge, technical and professional skills.
* Meaningful and exciting client projects
* A dedicated mentor following your career journey and a strong learning culture.
* The opportunity to get involved in Accenture’s volunteering, Women in Tech, sport- and social groups.
* Access to industry and capability specialists in all corners of the world with outstanding international knowledge and experience and opportunities working with a great variation of projects and industries.
* A great and inclusive working environment, where you will work with inspiring and skilled colleagues and managers.
**Sounds like your next challenge?** If developing software at the heart of next-generation vehicles sounds like your kind of work, apply now by sending your CV and relevant certificates.


.

title: Embedded SoC Platform Developer to Accenture Industry X
description:
Accenture is hiring **Embedded SoC Platform Developers**to strengthen our automotive team in Gothenburg. Industry X is Accenture’s capability focused on engineering and manufacturing transformation — it’s about how products are designed, built, connected, and operated across their entire lifecycle.

**About the Role**


In this role you build the software foundation for high-performance automotive computing platforms based on modern SoCs and HPCs. Working with QNX OS and virtualization technologies, you enable scalable, safe, and high-performing vehicle architectures. This role is based on-site in Gothenburg, thus we look for candidates having the right to work in Sweden or the EU.

**Your Mission**


You bring up boards, integrate operating systems and hypervisors, and deliver core platform functionality for complex SoC-based systems. Your work ensures performance, safety, and security across mixed-criticality environments.

**What Awaits You**

*System Bring-Up*


You support SoC and HPC bring-up, implement boot chains, and ensure stable system startup from early firmware to OS level.

 *Virtualization & QNX Expertise*


You configure and integrate QNX OS and QNX Hypervisor features, enabling virtualization and mixed-criticality system setups.

 *Integration & Optimization*


You collaborate with system and platform teams to debug, optimize, and deliver end-to-end SoC platform solutions.


  

**What****We’re****Looking Forward To**

* You have a completed degree in computer science, electrical engineering, or a comparable technical discipline.
* You bring several years of experience in embedded software development for SoC- or HPC-based systems.
* You have hands-on experience with QNX OS, hypervisor technologies, or strong RTOS/Linux-based platform environments.
* You are familiar with system bring-up, boot chains, virtualization concepts, and platform integration.
* You are willing to travel occasionally depending on project context and enjoy working in international teams.
* You communicate fluently in English; Swedish and/or German language skills are considered a plus.
**What we can offer you**

* Competitive compensation and benefits
* Flexible worktime with a good work-life balance
* Significant development opportunities and support for progressing in your professional career.
* Rich opportunities to develop your business acumen, consulting toolbox, industry knowledge, technical and professional skills.
* Meaningful and exciting client projects
* A dedicated mentor following your career journey and a strong learning culture.
* The opportunity to get involved in Accenture’s volunteering, Women in Tech, sport- and social groups.
* Access to industry and capability specialists in all corners of the world with outstanding international knowledge and experience and opportunities working with a great variation of projects and industries.
* A great and inclusive working environment, where you will work with inspiring and skilled colleagues and managers.
**Sounds like your next challenge?** If shaping the software foundation of next-generation vehicles sounds like your kind of work, apply now by sending your CV and relevant certificates.

title: Senior systemutvecklare
description:
**Professional Galaxy** är ett IT- och teknikkonsultbolag som tillhandahåller högspecialiserad kompetens inom IT, mjukvaruutveckling, SAP, inköp, elektronik och mekanisk konstruktion. Vi samarbetar med erfarna seniora experter och levererar strategiskt värdeskapande kompetens till några av Sveriges mest komplexa och analytiskt krävande projekt. Vårt fokus ligger alltid på hög kvalitet, professionalism och tydliga, mätbara resultat.


Vi söker nu en **Senior systemutvecklare** hos vår kund.

 **Kravprofil**  

Kundens beskrivning:  

Vi har behov av att anlita en senior fullstack systemutvecklare med mycket god kompetens inom backendutveckling och god kompetens inom frontendutveckling.  

Konsulten kommer medverka i hela utvecklingskedjan från design, utveckling och test i ett agilt arbetssätt. Utvecklingsprojekten är heltäckande och omfattar både frontend- och backendutveckling, vilket innebär att konsulten behöver en lång erfarenhet av liknande projekt.  

SPV:s förvaltnings- och utvecklingsteam arbetar enligt agila principer. Vi söker därför konsulter som är lagspelare och som ser samarbete och kunskapsdelning som en självklarhet för att lyckas. Vi förväntar oss att konsulterna har ett stort engagemang och kan driva sitt eget, såväl som teamets arbete framåt. I uppdragen ingår att dokumentera enligt SPV:s riktlinjer och att kompetens överförs till utsedd personal på ett tillfredställande sätt.  

  

Konsulterna ska även kunna bistå med kompetens till och arbete med andra uppdrag som uppdragsgivaren väljer ut.  

I utvecklingsprojekten kommer konsulterna primärt att utveckla mot .NET plattformen genom programmeringsspråket C#.  

  

Vi ser att konsulten är en erfaren utvecklare och har förmågan att snabbt konkretisera verksamheten och IT:s krav till körbar kod. Vi ser också att konsulten har en lång erfarenhet av SQL-server, då det är vår centrala databashanterare. Asynkron och synkron kommunikation kommer nyttjas och IT-stöden ska kunna hantera meddelandebaserad kommunikation i ett distribuerat system. Som stöd i utvecklingen nyttjar vi AzureDevops och dess funktioner. Vi ser att konsulten har god erfarenhet av verktyget och dess funktioner för systemutveckling eller liknande verktyg.  

  

Övriga teknologier som vi nyttjar och som vi ser som meriterande är om konsulten har erfarenhet av:  

* NServiceBus
* Blazor
* Elastic (logghantering)
* Clean Architecture (designprinciper vi följer)

  

Rollen ska även kunna bistå med kompetens till andra uppdrag som uppdragsgivaren väljer ut. I uppdraget ingår att dokumentera enligt SPV:s riktlinjer och att kompetens överförs till utsedd personal.  

  

OBSERVERA att uppdraget kräver att konsulten genomgår säkerhetsprövning inkl registerkontroll innan uppdragsstart.  

  

SKALLKRAV som måste uppfyllas:  

* Minst 9 års erfarenhet som systemutvecklare av Backend och API-utveckling genom C# .Net.
* Minst 9 års erfarenhet som systemutvecklare inom distribuerade system och meddelandebaserade IT stöd.
* Minst 4 års er erfarenhet av att utveckla med Azure DevOps som stödverktyg.
* Minst 4 års erfarenhet att nyttja och utveckla mot SQL-server.

  

MERITERANDE KRAV:  

* Erfarenhet av att utveckla och förvalta IT-stöd med hjälp av NServiceBus eller liknande ramverk som erbjuder köhantering, transaktionshantering och distribuerade arbetsflöden
* Erfarenhet av att bygga webbapplikationer genom Blazor eller motsvarande
* Erfarenhet att säkerställa integration mot en central logghantering såsom Elastic Search
* Erfarenhet av att utveckla utifrån principerna i Clean Architecture
* Erfarenhet av att bygga automatiserade tester

**Uppdragslängd:** Till 2027-12-31 med option på förlängning ytterligare 12 månader

title: Konsultuppdrag | Senior Data Engineer / Backend Developer
description:
Stockholm  

Teamet arbetar normalt tillsammans på kontoret en dag per vecka för samarbete och planering. Vid särskilda behov, exempelvis i samband med releaser eller andra verksamhetskritiska aktiviteter, förväntas ökad närvaro på plats.  

Start efter sommaren
  

Endast frilansare för detta uppdrag.  

  

För en av våra kunder söker vi nu en mycket senior Data Engineer / Backendutvecklare för ett långsiktigt uppdrag där du får en central roll i utvecklingen och förvaltningen av verksamhetskritiska datalösningar.


I rollen kommer du att ta tekniskt ägarskap för datainhämtning, datakvalitet och utveckling av centrala delar av plattformen. Uppdraget passar dig som trivs med att arbeta nära produkten, ta ansvar för tekniska beslut och bidra långsiktigt i en miljö där kvalitet, stabilitet och hållbara lösningar står i fokus.


Du kommer att arbeta hands-on med utveckling av produktionskod för datainhämtning, bearbetning och validering av extern data, samt bidra inom databaser, datamodellering och datadrivna funktioner kopplade till sök och produktutveckling.


Vi söker dig som är senior i din kompetens, arbetar proaktivt och trivs i mindre, erfarna team där stort eget ansvar och samarbete är en naturlig del av vardagen.

**Ansvarsområden**

* Utveckla och förvalta produktionsnära lösningar för datainhämtning och datahantering
* Säkerställa hög kvalitet inom dataflöden och datavalidering
* Arbeta med databaser, datamodellering och externa datakällor
* Utveckla och underhålla lösningar för bearbetning av stora och komplexa datamängder
* Bidra till tekniska beslut, arkitektur och långsiktig kvalitet i plattformen
* Samarbeta nära produkt och utvecklingsteam i en senior teknisk miljö

**Teknisk kompetens – krav**

* Mycket stark erfarenhet av backendutveckling
* Flerårig erfarenhet av JavaScript / Node.js i produktionsmiljö
* Erfarenhet av arbete med komplex data, externa system och databaser (SQL, exempelvis PostgreSQL)
* Erfarenhet av att utveckla och förvalta produktionskod för dataflöden
* God vana av Git, Pull Requests och kodgranskning
* Erfarenhet av datainhämtning och bearbetning av externa datakällor

**Meriterande erfarenheter**

* Erfarenhet av sök- och indexeringslösningar, exempelvis Elastic
* Erfarenhet av ML eller datarelaterade heuristiska modeller
* Erfarenhet av Python parallellt med Node.js
* Erfarenhet av datatunga system i produktionsmiljö

**Vi tror att du är**

* En mycket senior utvecklare med hög teknisk höjd
* Proaktiv och lösningsorienterad
* Bekväm med att ta tekniskt ägarskap och ansvar över tid
* Van att arbeta självständigt och i mindre seniora team

 **Om oss**

*Senterprise är ett ledande rekryteringsbolag inom IT och en oberoende förmedlare av frilansande konsulter. Med aktiv headhunting, search och djup teknisk förståelse hjälper vi några av Sveriges främsta arbetsgivare att hitta rätt kandidater, både för anställning och konsultuppdrag.*

*Läs vidare på* *www.senterprise.se*

title: Backend Developer for Simulation & Validation Platform
description:
**About Vimotek**


Vimotek is a space company, recently named on **Ny Teknik’s 33 List** as one of Sweden’s most promising technology startups, working to de-risk spacecraft proximity operations, accelerate time-to-orbit and enable scaling of in-orbit services.


The company equips space companies’ engineering and operations teams with leading dual-use solutions for in-space automation within two closely associated and complementary domains:

* **Digital Twins of Spacecraft for Missions Simulation and Validation**
* **AI-Driven Sensing, Perception and Control**

**Your role**


We are now looking for an experienced **Backend Developer** who wants to take a central role in shaping both our product and the technical foundation behind it. This is a role for someone who enjoys building products from the ground up, cares deeply about quality and reliability, and wants real influence in a **fast-growing, ambitious company**.


As a Backend Developer at Vimotek, you will work closely with product owners, engineers, and the software team to shape the direction of our simulation and validation platform. You will contribute both strategically and hands-on, helping us build **scalable, reliable, and maintainable systems** for the next phase of our product.

**You will:**

* Collaborate with product owners to shape product direction and business strategy.
* Contribute your experience as a developer to help grow the team and improve how we work.
* Use your strong cloud and infrastructure expertise to ensure scalability, reliability, and long-term maintainability.
* Lead the team’s work in planning and prioritizing development efforts.
* Take an active, hands-on role in backend development and core product functionality.
* Work on simulation capabilities for **complex space operations**.
* Support engineers from different disciplines in developing simulation functionality, including areas such as thermal systems, robotics, orbital mechanics, and more.

**Required Skills and Qualifications:**

* At least **5 years of professional software development experience**.
* Strong experience building backend systems from the ground up.
* Solid understanding of system design, software architecture, and scalable backend design.
* Hands-on experience with cloud infrastructure, hybrid infrastructure, or modern deployment environments.
* Experience designing, deploying, and maintaining reliable production systems.
* Practical experience with technologies such as **Python, Java, Go, REST APIs, GraphQL, Docker, Kubernetes, databases, and GitHub Actions**.
* Strong understanding of **DevOps practices and modern CI/CD workflows**.
* Ability to contribute hands-on to backend development as well as core product functionality.
* Experience working with performance, reliability, maintainability, and long-term scalability in mind.
* Ability to collaborate closely with product owners and engineering teams to shape product direction and technical priorities.
* Willingness to take ownership, lead planning and prioritization, and help improve team processes.
* Interest in working primarily on-site with a young, ambitious, and fast-moving team.

**Bonus Skills (Nice to Have)**

* Previous experience in the space industry.
* Experience with digital twins or complex simulation software.
* Knowledge of simulation domains such as orbital mechanics, robotics, thermal systems, or other engineering simulations.
* Experience developing software for validation, verification, or mission-critical systems.
* Experience with AI-assisted development or applying AI in modern software workflows.
* Experience working in a startup, scaleup, or product-led technology company.
* Frontend experience with React.


The company’s primary language is **English**, proficiency in additional languages is a plus.

**Right to work in Sweden:** You must already have legal authorization to work in Sweden (EU/EEA citizenship, permanent residence, or a valid Swedish work permit). We cannot offer visa sponsorship for this role.

**Location:** This role is based in Luleå and requires working on-site regularly.

*Join Vimotek and our exciting mission to develop the solutions that will enable industrialization of space - let’s do great things together!*

title: Senior System Developer - Walley
description:
**Empowering merchants, enabling seamless shopping.**


At Walley, we are building payment solutions that make shopping experiences smooth and secure for millions of customers every year. Our teams are at the heart of that mission, and we are now looking for more amazing developers who want to help us take it to the next level.

**About the Role**


As part of our backend teams, you will work with one of Walley's most business-critical products that handles thousands of transactions every day. We follow a DevOps mindset, taking full ownership from idea to production, and continuously improving performance, reliability, and scalability.


You will work in a cross-functional, autonomous team that values quality, collaboration, and learning. Every line of code you write can have a real impact, both on our customers and our business.

**What You Will Do**

* Design, build, and maintain scalable backend services in .NET and C#
* Develop and optimize cloud-native systems in Azure
* Work with infrastructure as code using Terraform
* Ensure observability, maintainability, and performance across our systems
* Collaborate closely with other developers, product managers, and designers to create high-quality, data-driven solutions
* Contribute to continuous improvement and modern DevOps practices

**What We Are Looking For**


We believe you are an experienced developer who thrives in a collaborative environment and enjoys taking responsibility for the entire product lifecycle. You are pragmatic, curious, and humble, and you have a strong product mindset and passion for delivering great quality, resilient systems, and security.

**You likely have:**

* 5+ years of backend experience, primarily in .NET and C#
* Proven experience with Azure and Terraform
* A DevOps mindset and experience with continuous deployment and cloud-native architectures
* Hands-on experience with several of the following:


	+ Azure Service Bus, CosmosDB, Elasticsearch
	+ Kibana, Grafana
	+ Kubernetes, ArgoCD
	+ Akka
* An interest in e-commerce, fintech, or high-transaction systems

**How We Work**


We work in a hybrid setup, with our main office located at Lilla Bommen in Gothenburg. Three days a week we collaborate on-site to share ideas, build knowledge, and move faster together. Walley is a tech-driven, autonomous part of Norion Bank (formerly Collector Bank). Since 2005, we have been helping merchants across the Nordics grow through smarter, more flexible payment solutions.

**Why Join Us**

* Work with modern technology in a high-impact product area
* Be part of a humble and skilled team that values collaboration and learning
* Have autonomy and influence over tools, methods, and processes
* Help shape the quality culture of one of the Nordics’ leading payment solutions
* Ready to build and ensure the quality of the next generation of payment experiences?


Join us at Walley, where great technology meets real-world impact.

**ABOUT WALLEY**


Walley is one of the largest payment providers in the Nordics with more than 6 million active end customers over the past year. We're a tech-driven, autonomous part of the Norion Bank group and have been working with payment solutions and digital purchase journeys since 2005. Walley's product organization is divided into seven autonomous product teams. The product you'll help build is used by millions of customers!

**NORION BANK’S OFFER TO YOU**


At Norion Bank, we believe that every individual's growth and development should be highly valued. This means a strong focus on self-leadership and continuous competence development. A sense of community, innovation, and modern ways of working are key characteristics of Norion Bank Group. In short, we offer an organization with short decision-making paths, great openness, and plenty of energy. As part of our team, you will contribute to and be shaped by our strong company culture. We offer you an exciting workplace with excellent opportunities for growth, continuous learning, and shared activities both inside and outside the workplace.

**BIAS-FREE RECRUITMENT**


We want our recruitment process to be fair and inclusive. Therefore, we kindly ask you not to attach a photo or include any information that is not relevant to the position. A personal letter is not required.

**INTERESTED?**


Great! We review applications and conduct interviews on an ongoing basis, so don't wait - apply today! Have any questions? You're very welcome to get in touch with us! For questions about the team or the role, please contact Elsa Karlsson at elsa.karlsson@walley.se.  

  

#Walley

title: Product Developer RTW & Acc
description:
We're making a big move and we want you to be part of it.


We are relocating several of our core departments from London to Gothenburg, and as a result, we're growing our Swedish team in a major way. This means we're hiring across multiple departments simultaneously - including Brand, Product, Design, and more.


This is a unique moment to join a fast-moving, internationally recognised fashion brand as we expand our presence in Sweden. If you've been waiting for an opportunity to be part of something exciting - this is it.


Explore our open roles and find where you fit.

  

We are now looking for several roles as Product Developer – for RTW & Acc. The roles are responsible for overseeing the full product lifecycle for RTW products across multiple categories, including sourcing, development, fittings, PPS, SMS and production.

  

WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR


You are passionate about product and take ownership of quality from start to finish -someone who brings both technical precision and a collaborative spirit to every stage of the process.

  

WHAT YOU WILL DO

* Oversee full RTW product lifecycle from seasonal kick-off to shipment, ensuring quality, on-time delivery, and optimized bulk processes
* Lead products, fittings and ensure adherence to Axel Arigato quality standards
* Ensure on-time execution against the critical path, including cross-department alignments as well as with suppliers, to meet key business dates and ensure deliveries of all rounds of samples as well as production on time
* Support pre-bookings, drop planning, and capacity booking at various creation stages
* Maintain updated PLM and internal systems to ensure information accessibility for cross-functional teams
* Support supplier sourcing and counter-sourcing strategies in liaison with Head of Development & Production
* Build and maintain strong working relationships with suppliers
* Drive improvements in production delivery, quality, and lead times

  

ARE YOU THE ONE?

* Bachelor's or Graduate degree in a relevant field
* 5+ years in RTW product development, at least two years within a brand
* Proficient in MS Office, Adobe and PLM
* Experience with garment construction, fitting, and fast-paced environments
* Strong understanding of complex garment construction and techniques
* Analytical, structured, and highly organized
* Proactive problem-solver with the ability to prioritize and coordinate multiple activities
* Enthusiastic, quick to learn, adaptable, and passionate about the product

  

HERE'S HOW TO APPLY


If you are ready to take ownership of the full RTW product lifecycle and help build exceptional products at Axel Arigato, apply today and join the next chapter of our creative journey.


Apply by submitting your CV. We also welcome a short cover letter telling us why you think you would be a great fit for this role. Please do not include a photo or date of birth with your application; our recruitment process is competency based.


We review applications continuously and the position may be filled before the closing date.

  

DETAILS


Contract type: Full-time


Reports to: Head of Development & Production RTW


Location: Gothenburg


Work mode: On-site, travel required


Start date: ASAP


Direct reports: No


Financial accountability: No

  

A BIT ABOUT AXEL ARIGATO


Founded in Sweden in 2014 by Albin Johansson and Max Svärdh, Axel Arigato was born with a disruptive mindset, modernising and democratising the sneaker landscape through a blend of style, quality, community and a digital-first approach.  

  

Grounded in Scandinavian minimalism and elevated with playful, intentional details, every piece is designed with care: crafted to move globally, worn with individuality.

  

What began online expanded into physical spaces built for energetic cultural exchange: stores and experiences where conversations, performances and unexpected activations dissolve the boundaries between brand and culture.

  

Today, Axel Arigato continues to evolve with purpose via a people-powered approach. It shows up where culture happens: on streets, at events and across cities.  

  

Built on curiosity. Driven by connection.

  

OUR VALUES


DROP: Diversity, Respect, Openness and Passion are our core values. We are an equal opportunity employer and welcome applications from all backgrounds.

title: Backend Developer (Node.js) - Card team
description:
Dedicated to powering entrepreneurs, Qred is a profitable, fast-growing fintech scale-up bank. In 10 years, we’ve grown from a startup to hitting 1 billion SEK in annual revenue, supporting over 50,000 entrepreneurs and helping create 10,000+ jobs every year. We combine smart tech with real-world experience to make funding simple, fast, and fair for entrepreneurs who need it most.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a core member of our Card Services team, you will own the mission-critical systems defining the Qred VISA experience. This role bridges the gap between high-resiliency financial architecture and the future of AI-driven development, providing end-to-end ownership of features that solve complex cashflow problems. You will be instrumental in Scaling our product across new markets. If you want high-impact ownership in a fast-moving, mission-critical domain, this is it.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Build and maintain highly resilient backend services using Node.js to support massive transaction volumes and real-time payment features.
* Drive the evolution of our AI-SDLC, leveraging advanced tooling to accelerate delivery speed without compromising on security or performance.
* Ensure system stability by taking full ownership of automated testing and DevOps practices within a microservices environment.
* Translate business requirements into technical specifications, collaborating closely with Product Managers and Tech Leads to drive Fintech innovation.


**What We're Looking For**
 We are looking for a senior engineer with a structured approach to problem-solving and a drive to build scalable frameworks. You should be motivated by technical precision and thrive in environments where you can drive alignment across teams and maintain a high bar for code quality.
   

  

**Qualification**
* A few years of experience in backend development, specifically with Node.js.
* Knowledge of AWS cloud infrastructure and microservice architecture.
* Proven experience with RESTful APIs and modern DevOps/Continuous Delivery pipelines.
* Background in Fintech, banking, or regulated environments, specifically within cards and payments, is highly prefferd.
* Strong interest or experience in AI-augmented development and integrating LLM-based agents into production systems.


**Why Qred?**
 This is the place to be if you’re looking for a place to grow. Qred is growing fast, and our Qredsters along with it. With a non-bureaucratic organization and delegated responsibilities, we make sure there’s a short path from idea to action. In addition to our great culture, you get to work with the latest cutting-edge techniques, responsibility for the whole development chain, and last but not least a bunch of great competent colleagues to learn from!
   

  

**One last thing**
 This is a full-time, permanent position based in our headquarters in Stockholm. We believe our culture thrives when we work together, which is why we have an
 **office-first approach** 
 . To balance this with some flexibility, we have the option of working remotely one day per week.
   

  

 We review applications on a rolling basis and while the start date is flexible, the right candidate can join us immediately.
   

  

*Qred celebrates diversity and does not discriminate based on ethnicity, religion, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability status, or any other applicable characteristics protected by law.*
 Qred is an international FinTech scale-up that specializes in digital financing solutions for small businesses, with operations in the Nordics, Benelux, Germany and Brazil. We are passionate about helping small businesses thrive and grow, by providing them with business loans and credit cards. Right now we’re in an exciting phase of our journey that focuses on growth through smart product development and technology fueled by international expansion.

title: Senior Software Engineer - Team AI (Bonnie)
description:
We are super excited to announce that Alexander, Stefan, Raveena, Bowen, Louise, Fernando and Robin are looking to welcome their next colleague to Team Bonnie.
   

  

 You will play a key role in evolving Bonnie - Voyado's AI agent - an always on, in-app companion that helps our users work smarter by understanding intent, remembering context and taking action across our CRM platform.
   

  

 Bonnie is not just another feature, it's becoming the interaction layer on top of the entire Engage product. We´re embedding AI capabilities across the platform and making sure it all feels like one coherent experience. Alongside Bonnie, we're also building a system for proactive, AI driven insights that surface opportunities before users even ask.
   

  

 Some of the things you'll be up to:
   

  

* Evolve the backend architecture behind Bonnie's agentic capabilities - from conversational segment creation, insights to action workflows to content generation and automatic translations.
* Build the machine that builds the product, create scalable systems, AI harnesses and infrastructure that enable advanced AI capabilities over time.
* Be part of the shift from exploration to production - introducing structure, testing and monitoring for AI services.
* Collaborate across many teams and product areas, helping integrate Bonnie while keeping the user experience consistent and not fragmented.
* Continuously iterate on Bonnie and its underlying agents - feeding back learnings, improvements and shaping how the product evolves.


 So, who are you?
   

  

 You are a senior backend developer who has already embraced AI as part of your everyday workflow. You're comfortable in an environment that is still evolving where not everything is not fully defined, where you'll be involved across multiple areas and where adaptability and initiative matter.
   

  

 You enjoy working across teams, influencing without owning everything and helping create structure where it doesn't yet exist.
   

  

**We believe you:**
* Have 5 years+ of object oriented backend development. C# and SQL is central in our stack but not a hard requirement.
* Have hands on experience working with AI coding tools and agents and can clearly explain how it has changed the way you build software.
* Build strong system design and architectural thinking - you know how to build scalable, maintainable systems over time not just generate code.
* Have experience working with cloud environments.
* Have an interest in (or experience with) LLM-based systems, including testing, evaluation and understanding their limitations.
* Are collaborative, flexible and proactive - someone who takes initiative, shares knowledge and helps others succeed.


 What's in it for you?
   

  

 Voyado wouldn’t be the powerful platform it is without the people behind it. We really care for our Voyadoers and some examples of what we can offer you are:
   

  

* An engaged team with a knowledge-sharing and friendly culture
* Summits where we hang out, workshop, discuss, and have a good time together
* Opportunities for personal and professional growth and learning in a dynamic and supportive environment.
* Work-life balance – we don't have a long work-hours culture, we value engagement over hours worked.
* An office-first but flexible hybrid working policy.


 Some of our benefits:
   

  

* 30 days of vacation, so you can spend time on the things you love
* Beneficial bike lease, including e-bikes
* Breakfast buffet on Fridays
* Inhouse gym only for Voyadoers
* A generous gadget-and-phone package (your choice!)
* 5000 SEK per year in wellness allowance
* Parental leave top-up additional support for new parents
* A wellness hour you can use every week


**Be yourself 🏳️‍🌈**
 At Voyado, we believe in gender equality. We are proud sponsors of Womengineer as well as Tjejer Kodar! Read more about Tjejer Kodar & Voyado here
   

  

  

  

 Equality is not only about gender but also about making everyone feel welcome and heard in a multicultural and diverse environment. We at Voyado strive to make everyone feel like they can bring their true self to work every day. Gender-equal and diverse teams have more perspectives on life and bring different ideas to the table which in the end leads not only to making a better working environment but also a better product.
   

  

 Ready to find out more?
   

  

 Lovely! 🎉
   

  

*Before one applies it can always feel like you need a better resume, more polish, or just another year of experience, but we say if you think this sounds like a place where you can shine don't hesitate to send in your resume!*
**Making it personal with AI**
 We truly believe you’ll position yourself best for success in the interview process by being yourself with support from AI where it makes sense, later in the process you will even be expected to use AI. But at the end of the day, what matters is meeting you, the person behind the application.
   

  

 There is no such thing as a perfect candidate; we’re all human so please, bring your authentic self! Don’t let AI over polish your CV or answers to the point where we can’t hear your real voice because that’s what we care about the most.
   

  

 In today’s hyper-competitive market, we help over 500 retail brands across 100 markets attract, convert, and retain loyal customers.
   

  

 With AI-driven CRM, loyalty, e-commerce personalization, and retail media, Voyado turns every interaction - online or in-store - into lasting growth.
   

  

 By combining customer data with product intelligence, we empower retailers to deliver the right message, product, or offer at exactly the right time. The result? Stronger customer relationships and measurable business impact.

title: Cloud Engineer
description:
We’re looking for a
 **Cloud Engineer** 
 who enjoys working in the space where developers and infrastructure meet. Here, you’ll spend your time automating the mundane, architecting the complex, and scaling the future of our Azure AI and OpenAI offerings. This role is for you if you find more joy in writing a PowerShell script to solve a recurring app error than in managing a cluster’s networking.
   

  

 This is a code-centric role where infrastructure is treated as a software product. Everything you build is versioned, reviewed, tested, and continuously improved. Our goal is to reduce repetitive work and create the “Golden Paths” that let developers and AI teams deploy quickly, securely, and reliably.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Cloud Engineer, you’ll help build and grow our Azure-based platform. You’ll own the design, automation, and delivery of modular cloud infrastructure, ensuring it’s resilient, scalable, and easy for teams to use. Your work will reduce friction, remove unnecessary steps, and make it simple for developers and data teams to focus on building features instead of worrying about infrastructure.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Build the "Golden Path" Pipelines: You won't just "run" pipelines; you will architect them. You’ll design and maintain CI/CD templates (YAML-based) that standardize how our applications are built, tested, and deployed. Your goal is to make the path from code-complete to production-ready as invisible and frictionless as possible for our developers.
* Automated Application Remediation: We don't believe in manual maintenance. You will use PowerShell and Azure DevOps to build automated pipelines for things like patching the container OS, reporting on deviations and self healing infrastructure
* Infrastructure as Versioned Code: You’ll design and implement modular Azure infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code (Bicep), following the Azure Well-Architected Framework for reliability, performance, and cost.


**We Are Looking For You Who Have**
* Expert-level PowerShell skills: We operate in an environment where automation is built on PowerShell first. (Bash & Python are secondary)
* Proven experience with Azure Bicep: You should be comfortable treating infrastructure as a software product, versioning, testing and modularizing Bicep code.
* Developer-centric approach: You don't need to be a fullstack developer, but you need to understand application logic enough to automate patching, troubleshoot database connections, and optimize application performance within the cloud.
* Fluency in English (written and spoken).


 You’ll be comfortable owning tasks end to end and making technical decisions independently within the areas listed above. Ideally, you have some years of hands-on experience with Azure, containers, and CI/CD pipelines, but we care more about what you can do and that you enjoy the field, rather than the exact number of years.
   

  

**It's Positive If You Have**
* Active Azure certifications such as AZ-400 (DevOps Engineer), AZ-305 (Solutions Architect), AZ-204 (Developer Associate)
* Experience from regulated or security-conscious environments is a plus


 In addition to this, it is important to us that you recognize yourself in our values: we are wholehearted, we collaborate and we take the lead.
   

  

 Read more about NOBA Benefits here: https://careers.noba.bank/pages/information
   

  

**Have you heard of NOBAVERSE?**
 In our NOBAVERSE, we value openness, trust, and diversity. Here, you can influence your own development and have fun along the way to achieving our goals – all in a workplace that’s a little extra
 *bubbly* 
 ! ✨
   

  

 Read more about our employee value proposition on our careers page.
   

  

**Read more about how our recruitment process works in the** 
**FAQ** 
**.**
 We care for your privacy and, with reference to the GDPR, would like to ask you not to include any sensitive personal data in your application, for examples information about ethnic origin, political opinions, religious beliefs or information about your health.
   

  

**Read more about how we handle your personal data** 
**here** 
**.**
 If you have any questions or concerns about the position, please contact the responsible recruiter.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application! 🙏✨

title: Expert Copilot Studio Developer
description:
**Job ID: 4464**
 We are seeking a senior, highly hands-on expert to design, build, and operationalise production-grade AI agents and automations in Asset & Wealth Management (AWM) with focus on Private Banking. In this role you will lead end-to-end delivery, from framing business problems and shaping solution design to industrialising and running secure, well-governed agent solutions – using Microsoft Power Platform (Power Automate, Copilot Studio), Azure AI services, and AWS (Bedrock, SageMaker). You will collaborate closely with business stakeholders, engineering teams, and control functions to accelerate large-scale AI adoption in a regulated banking environment.
   

  

 Nordea is a place where traditions meet tomorrow. We're not just a bank, we're a tech employer on a mission to evolve finance securely and responsibly. Together, we impact millions of people’s daily lives by ensuring they can access our solutions anytime, anywhere, while safeguarding their personal data and wealth. Join us in making an impact on the banking industry.
   

  

**About Our Team**
 Nordea is hiring for our AWM AI team in AWM Chief Operating Office (COO). The AWM COO drives operational excellence, supports business transformation, and fosters innovation across Asset & Wealth Management. Improving processes, leveraging technology, and ensuring strong governance and compliance to enable sustainable growth and superior client experiences. In this role you will work at the intersection of business transformation and advanced AI engineering, partnering closely with AWM business leaders (incl. Private Banking), architects, engineers, and control functions to turn an active AI pipeline into measurable outcomes through robust, reusable and well-governed agent solutions.
   

  

 The AWM AI team is being established in AWM COO to accelerate delivery and scale of AI capabilities across AWM, with a strong focus on Private Banking and selected cross-area dependencies. We build common AI architecture and reusable patterns, support a disciplined governance model, and partner closely with business units, engineering teams, and control functions to turn an active AI pipeline into measurable outcomes.
   

  

**Main responsibilities in this role include, but are not limited to:**
* Own delivery from idea to production: frame business problems, define success metrics, shape agent solution designs, prototype quickly, and industrialise into production-ready services
* Own agent solutions in production: Take accountability for operational readiness, stability, and continuous improvement of deployed agents, ensuring they remain safe, effective, and compliant as usage scales.
* Build and evolve agent solutions in Microsoft Power Platform (Copilot Studio, Power Automate and Azure AI services) and AWS (Bedrock, SageMaker), integrating with enterprise systems via APIs and secure tool access
* Lead stakeholder collaboration end-to-end: work with AWM business owners, product leads, architects, risk/compliance and engineers to ensure value, adoption, and scalable implementation
* Engineer for governance and safety: implement evaluations, guardrails, and human-in-the-loop patterns that meet expectations for privacy, auditability, and model risk in a regulated environment
* Enable reuse and scale: build reusable components, patterns, and reference implementations (prompts, tools, connectors, evaluation suites) to accelerate delivery across a portfolio of AWM use cases
* Operate and improve: monitor agent behaviour in production, iterate on prompts/tools/logic based on evals and feedback, and continuously optimise quality, cost, latency and safety
* Drive business impact and adoption: Partner with business owners to ensure agents are not only technically sound but deliver measurable outcomes, are actively adopted by users, and become part of everyday workflows.


**Who You Are**
 Collaboration. Ownership. Passion. Courage. These are the values that guide us in how we work and how we make decisions – and that we imagine you share with us.
   

  

 This is the right role for you if you are a curious, outcome-driven and pragmatic senior engineer who can take ownership, influence stakeholders, and raise engineering and governance standards while delivering working solutions at pace. You enjoy working in cross-functional teams and you are comfortable operating in an environment with high expectations on security, risk management and auditability. You naturally lead through expertise and execution, setting technical and governance standards for agent development and serving as a trusted senior counterpart to architects, engineers, and control functions.
   

  

**Your background and skills include:**
* 7+ years of professional experience building enterprise solutions on Microsoft Power Platform, including Power Automate and Copilot Studio (design, build, release and operate)
* Strong cloud experience across Azure and AWS, including deploying AI services and integrating with enterprise platforms via secure APIs
* Hands-on experience with agentic/LLM solution patterns (tool calling, planner–executor, multi-agent and human-in-the-loop) and strong prompting and Retrieval Augmented techniques (e.g., vector databases and grounding strategies)
* Production experience with generative AI applications, including evaluation practices (quality/correctness, latency, cost, safety) and responsible AI/guardrails
* Strong programming skills in Python and Java, including development of services for automation, data processing, and API/MCP integrations; disciplined engineering practices (testing, modular design, version control)
* Experience with containerisation (Docker), orchestration (Kubernetes) and Infrastructure as Code/CLIs (Terraform, Microsoft Power Platform CLI) for scalable, production-grade deployments
* Solid understanding of CI/CD and DevOps ways of working (e.g., Bitbucket, Jenkins), including release governance and operational readiness
* Ability to document and version workflows, prompts, tools and scripts in accordance with governance requirements (auditability, traceability, risk controls)


**It would be ideal if you also:**
* Have strong business engineering skills: analyse end-to-end workflows, translate stakeholder needs into requirements/KPIs, and drive adoption in partnership with business owners
* Have a keen interest in data, grounding and context management (e.g., analytics platforms such as Snowflake), and how to design agent solutions that are reusable at scale


**Why join**
 You will join a team building practical, high-impact AI capabilities across AWM—working on real advisor and operational workflows, with strong visibility and a clear focus on measurable outcomes. You will help shape how we build, govern, and scale agentic AI in a Nordic, regulated banking context.
   

  

 If you are passionate about agentic AI and eager to make a tangible impact in AWM, we invite you to apply and join our innovative COO team.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 Collaboration. Ownership. Passion. Courage. These are the values that guide us in how we work and how we make decisions – and that we imagine you share with us.
   

  

 People are driven by many different factors. For some, it’s to take their career to the next level. For others, it’s to break new ground within their area of expertise – in other words, with us, you will always move forward.
   

  

 A culture that fosters performance and growth in one of the largest Nordic banks, offering various opportunities to evolve, develop and learn from brilliant colleagues with diverse backgrounds in a vibrant working environment.
   

  

 Hybrid working model – we believe in the value of bringing people together and at the same time we embrace the freedom of flexibility.
   

  

 Diversity and inclusion are a natural part of our daily work. We know that an inclusive workplace is a sustainable one. We genuinely believe that our diverse backgrounds, experiences, characteristics and traits make us stronger together. Every day we strive to find new ways to improve diversity and inclusion within our community e.g. we have signed the European Diversity Charters in the countries where we operate to show our commitment and engage with others to continue learning and improving.
   

  

 If this sounds like you, get in touch!
   

  

**Next steps**
 Submit your application no later than 24/05/2026. For more information, you’re welcome to contact Thomas Vedel Kristensen at thomas.v.kristensen@nordea.com.
   

  

 We enable dreams and aspirations for a greater good.
   

  

 We build relationships. We add a personal touch to everything we do – when advising our customers, collaborating with colleagues, and meeting our potential candidates.
   

  

 We learn and develop. We take pride in being experts and thinking ahead. We use our expertise to meet our customers’ needs, from the simplest to the most complex. We bring a growth mindset to our work that enables us to focus on a broader perspective in our daily challenges.
   

  

 We lead change. We are responsible and aware of the impact of our decisions, both for our customers and for our local and global communities. Mindful of our responsibility towards current and future generations, we have made sustainability an integrated part of our business strategy.
   

  

 We are Nordea. We have a 200-year history of supporting and growing the Nordic economies and our values are deeply rooted in these open, progressive and collaborative societies. As one of the biggest employers in the Nordics, Poland and Estonia, you have excellent opportunities to evolve, develop and move forward with us.
   

  

 Studies show that members of underrepresented communities don’t apply for jobs unless they tick all the qualification boxes. If this is part of why you hesitate to apply, we would like you to reconsider and give it a chance. Maybe your profile fits our needs much better than you think.
   

  

**Only for candidates in Swden:** 
 For union information, please contact finansforbundet@nordea.se or SACONordea@nordea.com.

title: Engineering Manager - Core Experience (Format Foundations)
description:
We design Spotify’s consumer experience—end to end, moment to moment, across every screen, platform, and partner integration. Our mission is to make listening feel effortless, personal, and joyful for billions of users around the world. That means turning complexity into clarity across hundreds of touchpoints—from our mobile and desktop apps to the smart speakers, TVs, cars, and integrations where Spotify shows up every day. If it touches a consumer, we shape it. We bring deep insight into human behavior, design, and technology to craft experiences that feel intuitive, expressive, and unmistakably Spotify.
   

  

 You’ll join the Core Experience Studio within Spotify’s Experience Mission, working in the Format Foundations Product Area. This space builds the foundations behind how users experience artists, albums, podcasts, and more across the app.
   

  

 Within this area, you’ll lead Meadow — a backend platform team that powers scalable, content-agnostic metadata delivery. Meadow sits at the heart of many Spotify experiences, enabling teams across Music, Podcasts, Audiobooks, and beyond to build consistent, high-quality user experiences.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Lead a backend engineering team, with accountability for delivery, technical direction, and team health
* Define and evolve the technical strategy for metadata delivery systems, including fan-out serving, versioned contracts, and caching
* Shape the long-term vision of the team in line with Core Experience and broader platform strategy
* Partner closely with product, design, and engineering leaders to align priorities and drive execution
* Enable adoption of platform capabilities across multiple consumer-facing teams and content verticals
* Guide architectural decisions, review implementations, and help unblock complex technical challenges
* Drive adoption of AI-assisted development practices to improve speed, quality, and developer experience
* Support and grow engineers, fostering an inclusive and collaborative team environment


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have strong experience building and scaling backend systems for data delivery or platform infrastructure
* You understand patterns like fan-out architectures, API versioning, and caching strategies
* You have worked across end-to-end data systems, from pipelines to distribution layers
* You have experience leading engineering teams and supporting individuals in their growth
* You’ve contributed to cross-team technical strategy and aligned stakeholders around shared outcomes
* You are comfortable working with AI-assisted development tools and guiding teams in their use
* You think in systems and platforms, balancing the needs of internal developers and end users
* You care deeply about building inclusive teams where people feel supported and empowered
* You’re curious, adaptable, and comfortable navigating ambiguity


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in London or Stockholm
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home.


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Senior Software Engineer - TV Playback (C++)
description:
We design Spotify’s consumer experience—end to end, moment to moment, across every screen, platform, and partner integration. Our mission is to make listening feel effortless, personal, and joyful for billions of users around the world. That means turning complexity into clarity across hundreds of touchpoints—from our mobile and desktop apps to the smart speakers, TVs, cars, and integrations where Spotify shows up every day. If it touches a consumer, we shape it. We bring deep insight into human behavior, design, and technology to craft experiences that feel intuitive, expressive, and unmistakably Spotify.
   

  

 At Spotify, we’re building the best way to experience audio and video — everywhere, every time. As listening and watching on TV continues to grow, we’re investing deeply in native, video-first playback experiences that are fast, reliable, and feel effortless.
   

  

 The Native Playback team sits at the heart of Spotify’s TV strategy. We integrate Spotify’s playback experience with the native players and media frameworks available on each platform. Our work happens close to the system — where performance, reliability, and quality truly matter — and directly impacts how millions of people experience Spotify every day.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Design, build, and evolve the C++ integration layer that powers Spotify’s audio and video playback on TV devices running our new Rust runtime
* Integrate Spotify’s playback experience with platform-native media frameworks such as AVPlayer, ExoPlayer, or equivalent TV player stacks
* Own critical playback areas including buffering strategies, playback state handling, A/V synchronization, adaptive bitrate configuration, track selection, and rendering paths
* Debug complex performance and reliability issues across multiple layers — from application logic to OS-level frameworks and hardware acceleration
* Partner closely with Playback platform teams and device teams to ensure shared APIs and designs translate cleanly into real-world TV implementations
* Improve test coverage, tooling, and observability to detect regressions and speed up iteration cycles
* Contribute to thoughtful technical design discussions and raise the bar for playback quality through code reviews and knowledge sharing


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have strong of experience building low-level systems in C++, ideally within video, media, or playback domains
* You have hands-on experience integrating native playback frameworks such as AVPlayer, ExoPlayer, vendor SDKs, or similar media stacks
* You have a deep understanding of video playback fundamentals including codecs, streaming formats, adaptive bitrate (ABR), buffering behavior, and A/V synchronization trade-offs
* You are comfortable working close to the OS and media framework layer and diagnosing issues that span multiple system boundaries
* You have experience contributing to the design and evolution of scalable technical systems across platforms
* You are confident debugging performance and reliability issues using logs, traces, profilers, and system diagnostics tools
* You collaborate effectively across teams and communicate technical trade-offs clearly
* You care deeply about delivering reliable, high-quality playback experiences for millions of users


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in London or Stockholm.
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best. While some in-person collaboration is expected, you’ll also have the option to work from home.


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
